assertions.title: Full-control mode can reject a pending request and keep the blocked action from proceeding

steps.action: Run approvals queue widget test `full-control mode can reject pending approvals and sync queue/thread status`.
steps.expected: Rejecting in full-control resolves the request as rejected, keeps the blocked action from resuming, and syncs the rejected state across queue and thread surfaces.
steps.observed: The test passed with an already-resolved-as-rejected detail state, no resumed-after-approval text, a Rejected queue item, and Rejected shown on the originating thread detail surface.

assertions.title: Access mode changes take effect across turn controls, approvals, and git actions without reinstall or re-pair

steps.action: Run approvals widget test `approval detail mode changes update approve/reject actionability in place`.
steps.expected: An already open approval detail updates actionability immediately when runtime access mode changes.
steps.observed: The test passed while approve/reject changed from enabled to disabled in place after switching to read-only, then re-enabled after returning to full-control.

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `changing access mode from settings immediately gates turn and git controls`.

steps.observed: The test passed with the turn submit and git pull controls disabling immediately after the mode changed to read-only.

assertions.title: Dangerous git mutations are approval-gated before execution

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `git status and mutations show context and refresh state` in the control-with-approvals harness.

steps.observed: The test passed with pending-approval messages for branch switch, pull, and push plus matching thread approval status entries, while immediate success messages were absent.

assertions.title: Control-with-approvals mode permits normal control but gates dangerous actions

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `idle composer starts turn and transitions to active controls`.
steps.expected: Control-with-approvals mode can still start a turn from an idle thread.
steps.observed: The test passed with the idle thread entering Running and showing active turn controls.

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `active composer steers and interrupt stops the active turn`.
steps.expected: Control-with-approvals mode can still steer and interrupt the current turn.
steps.observed: The test passed with steering applied to the same active thread and interrupt returning the thread to Interrupted/idle state.

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `git status and mutations show context and refresh state`.
steps.expected: Dangerous git actions stay gated behind approvals instead of executing immediately in control-with-approvals mode.
steps.observed: The test passed with branch switch, pull, and push surfacing pending approval messages and approval status entries rather than immediate mutation success.

assertions.title: Start or steer failures surface clear errors and leave the thread usable

steps.observed: The test passed with a clear start-failure message, Start turn still available, and a successful immediate retry back to Running.

steps.action: Run thread detail widget test `steer failure surfaces clear error and keeps active thread usable`.
steps.expected: A failed steer shows a clear error while leaving the active thread usable for a follow-up steer attempt.
steps.observed: The test passed with a steer-failure message, Running state preserved, and a successful follow-up steer that cleared the error.
